name: Raspberry Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until frothy.
2. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating until soft peaks form.
3. Incorporate the vanilla and almond extracts.
4. Gradually add the sugar, beating until stiff and scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Sift the cake flour over the beaten eggs.
6. Gently fold in the raspberries with the batter until well combined.
7. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes, or until lightly browned and the top is dry.
9. Invert the cake pan immediately after baking to cool completely.
